nameMeanings.name: Haward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Haward (Old Scandinavian Hávarðr, Hawarth, Havardh ‘high or chief warden or guardian’), cognate with and occasionally confused with Continental Germanic Howard; see Howard (1) and (2).

variants.name: Howard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Constance Haward was born in 1430, in England. She had at least 1 son with Robert Castell Sr.. She died in 1460, in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Haward(은)는 1430년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert Castell Sr.(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이스트 하틀리에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.
